text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Fan Fest... That is,<n>today's the day
my life ends...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't tell my fans to have a bit of<n>fun and let
bygones be bygones.<n>That's not going to cut it.

I really screwed up at the Kinko Sho<n>with the way I
was acting. My former<n>fans are going to bombard
me with<n>questions until there's no trace of me
left...

M-maybe you're right. In a way, this<n>is an
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to apologize to them, at the<n>very least. After
that, I can live<n>peacefully in some forgotten corner
of<n>the Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Once all the other events are over, the
meet-and-greet commences. Soon,<n>it's
Matikanefukukitaru's turn to<n>take the stage.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
H-how am I supposed to interpret this<n>commotion?
At least they aren't<n>yelling at me, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru, could you tell us<n>your goal for
this spring?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Just getting right to it, huh?! My<n>goal for the
spring...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To quietly enjoy some rice crackers<n>on the
veranda and sip some tea. Nice<n>and quiet-like.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, riiight... And what's your next<n>goal after
that?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna catch a break here, am<n>I?! What
should I do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Why don't you just tell them?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What?! Are you serious?! Are you<n>seriously
serious? Uuugh... If this<n>goes sideways, it's on
you...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'd like to make an<n>announcement! This
spring, my<n>goal—or, I should say—my dream is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: To race in the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eeek, I can't believe I just said that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, don't throw things at me! Let's<n>keep the
venue nice and clean!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: W-wait, what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: People are clapping? B-but why?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Sounds good, Matikanefukukitaru!<n>You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You'd better make that wish come<n>true! I'll come
and support you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Why are you all being so nice to me?<n>After my
performance at the Kinko<n>Sho... It was a disgrace.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I thought you were hilarious! It was<n>so bad that it
was good. You were<n>endearing... in your own way.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
We all have those moments—that<n>feeling when
you think you've got it<n>all in the bag, but you
don't. I found it<n>pretty relatable.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Relatable? Does this mean you<n>haven't
abandoned me yet?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
We're not gonna abandon you. I<n>mean, you tried
so hard at the Kikuka<n>Sho.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I'll stick with you through thick and<n>thin. I'm
gonna vote for you for the<n>Takarazuka Kinen,
okay? Make sure<n>you enter the race after that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
W-wow, are you all... gods?<n>Buddhas? I can't
believe people with<n>this much mercy in their hearts
really<n>exist...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm crying, I'm sweating... All<n>these fluids
are pouring out of me! I<n>can't believe it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... Thank you! I'm going to<n>give this
another go.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just like that time I desperately<n>clambered up that
cliff to beg for good<n>luck.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry about what happened,<n>everyone. I lost
sight of myself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I promise to try harder in the future.<n>As proof, I'll
perform the sacred rite<n>and squat 108 times! So
please go on<n>easy on me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Warm laughter fills the venue.<n>Matikanefukukitaru
goes on to<n>secure a spot in the Takarazuka<n>Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm going back to the basics and<n>starting from
zero. I know I disappoint<n>you sometimes, but keep
watching<n>over me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her gods may have abandoned her,<n>but her fans
were there to pick up the<n>pieces. In the end,
Matikanefukukitaru manages to<n>secure a spot in
the Takarazuka<n>Kinen.
